'''鈭歳-dh-ng''' ('''radhanga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stark|stark]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-dh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stark|stark]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-dh-ng
|-
! Lemma
| radhanga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:radhangithi|radhangithi]] || [[word:radhangiji|radhangiji]] || [[word:radhangishi|radhangishi]] || [[word:radhangi|radhangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:radhanguthuth|radhanguthuth]] || [[word:radhangujuj|radhangujuj]] || [[word:radhangushush|radhangushush]] || [[word:radhang|radhang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:radhanguthu|radhanguthu]] || [[word:radhanguju|radhanguju]] || [[word:radhangushu|radhangushu]] || [[word:radhangu|radhangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:radhangufuth|radhangufuth]] || [[word:radhangufuj|radhangufuj]] || [[word:radhangufush|radhangufush]] || [[word:radhanguf|radhanguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:radhangethe|radhangethe]] || [[word:radhangeje|radhangeje]] || [[word:radhangeshe|radhangeshe]] || [[word:radhange|radhange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:radhangothoth|radhangothoth]] || [[word:radhangojoj|radhangojoj]] || [[word:radhangoshosh|radhangoshosh]] || [[word:radhang|radhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:radhangotho|radhangotho]] || [[word:radhangojo|radhangojo]] || [[word:radhangosho|radhangosho]] || [[word:radhango|radhango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:radhangofoth|radhangofoth]] || [[word:radhangofoj|radhangofoj]] || [[word:radhangofosh|radhangofosh]] || [[word:radhangof|radhangof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:radhang忙th忙|radhang忙th忙]] || [[word:radhang忙j忙|radhang忙j忙]] || [[word:radhang忙sh忙|radhang忙sh忙]] || [[word:radhang忙|radhang忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:radhangathath|radhangathath]] || [[word:radhangajaj|radhangajaj]] || [[word:radhangashash|radhangashash]] || [[word:radhang|radhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:radhangatha|radhangatha]] || [[word:radhangaja|radhangaja]] || [[word:radhangasha|radhangasha]] || [[word:radhanga|radhanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:radhangafath|radhangafath]] || [[word:radhangafaj|radhangafaj]] || [[word:radhangafash|radhangafash]] || [[word:radhangaf|radhangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:radhangasha|radhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goradhangasha|goradhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiradhangasha|gokiradhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:radhangn眉sha|radhangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goradhangnkn眉sha|goradhangnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiradhangn眉sha|gokiradhangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:radhangsh毛sha|radhangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goradhangnksh毛sha|goradhangnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiradhangsh毛sha|gokiradhangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:radhangrosha|radhangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goradhangnkrosha|goradhangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiradhangrosha|gokiradhangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:radhangmusha|radhangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goradhangnkmusha|goradhangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiradhangmusha|gokiradhangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:radhangsherasha|radhangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goradhangnksherasha|goradhangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiradhangsherasha|gokiradhangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:radhangasha|radhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goradhangnkngasha|goradhangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiradhangasha|gokiradhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:radhangyasha|radhangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goradhangnkyasha|goradhangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiradhangyasha|gokiradhangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:radhangyamasha|radhangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goradhangnkyamasha|goradhangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiradhangyamasha|gokiradhangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:radhangn眉sh毛sha|radhangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goradhangnkn眉sh毛sha|goradhangnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiradhangn眉sh毛sha|gokiradhangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:radhangn眉rosha|radhangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goradhangnkn眉rosha|goradhangnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiradhangn眉rosha|gokiradhangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:radhangn眉musha|radhangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goradhangnkn眉musha|goradhangnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiradhangn眉musha|gokiradhangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:radhangsh毛n眉sha|radhangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goradhangnksh毛n眉sha|goradhangnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiradhangsh毛n眉sha|gokiradhangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:radhangsh毛rosha|radhangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goradhangnksh毛rosha|goradhangnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiradhangsh毛rosha|gokiradhangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:radhangsh毛musha|radhangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goradhangnksh毛musha|goradhangnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiradhangsh毛musha|gokiradhangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:radhangron眉sha|radhangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goradhangnkron眉sha|goradhangnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiradhangron眉sha|gokiradhangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:radhangrosh毛sha|radhangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goradhangnkrosh毛sha|goradhangnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiradhangrosh毛sha|gokiradhangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:radhangromusha|radhangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goradhangnkromusha|goradhangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiradhangromusha|gokiradhangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:radhangmun眉sha|radhangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goradhangnkmun眉sha|goradhangnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiradhangmun眉sha|gokiradhangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:radhangmush毛sha|radhangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goradhangnkmush毛sha|goradhangnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiradhangmush毛sha|gokiradhangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:radhangmurosha|radhangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goradhangnkmurosha|goradhangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiradhangmurosha|gokiradhangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:radhang|radhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:r忙dh忙ng|r忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horadhang|horadhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hor忙dh忙ng|hor忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoradhang|hohoradhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohor忙dh忙ng|hohor忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉radhang|n眉radhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉r忙dh忙ng|n眉r忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉radhang|n眉n眉radhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉r忙dh忙ng|n眉n眉r忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂radhang|n茂radhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂r忙dh忙ng|n茂r忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂radhang|n茂n茂radhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂r忙dh忙ng|n茂n茂r忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luradhang|luradhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lur忙dh忙ng|lur忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluradhang|luluradhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulur忙dh忙ng|lulur忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liradhang|liradhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lir忙dh忙ng|lir忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliradhang|liliradhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilir忙dh忙ng|lilir忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koradhang|koradhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kor忙dh忙ng|kor忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoradhang|kokoradhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokor忙dh忙ng|kokor忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keradhang|keradhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ker忙dh忙ng|ker忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeradhang|kekeradhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keker忙dh忙ng|keker忙dh忙ng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
